ques: Find the cheapest round-trip flight from New York to Paris leaving on June 27, 2026, and returning on July 10, 2026.
answer: The cheapest round-trip flight from New York to Paris (depart June 27, 2026; return July 10, 2026) is €778 total — a nonstop United flight departing Newark (EWR) at 5:40 PM and arriving Paris CDG at 7:05 AM.
